name: Belly of the beast
description: You are inside the ribcage of the long-dead beast. Leathery walls press close. The only light comes from a narrow fissure above, casting dim grey shadows. It smells of old death and deep earth. The opening above leads back out. There is a path down.{{recess_desc}}
ambient: Something drips steadily in the dark.
The walls creak and settle around you, as if breathing.

description_snippets.recess_desc: A small recess has been carved into the fleshy wall, roughly the shape of a talisman.

objects.name: flesh recess
objects.description: A small hollow in the leathery wall, shaped as if something was meant to fit inside.
objects.description_snippet: A small recess in the fleshy wall.

on_interact.look: The recess is roughly hand‑sized, with worn edges. Something was clearly meant to be placed here.
on_interact.unlock: You press the ancient talisman into the recess. It fits perfectly. With a wet, sucking sound, the flesh around it contracts and releases a hidden compartment.
on_interact.take: You reach into the recess and retrieve a pulsing organ – the Beast's Heart.
